stages.name: data_pipeline
stages.description: Tilize RM input to tiles, then immediately untilize back to RM. Identity passthrough testing the reader-tilize-untilize-writer data pipeline.

stages.name: reduce_mean
stages.description: Add reduce_row phase after tilize to compute row-wise mean using 1/W scaler. Output is reduced shape with only column 0 valid.

failure_history.summary: TypeError: __getitem__(): incompatible function arguments. The following argument types are supported:

details.message: __getitem__(): incompatible function arguments. The following argument types are supported:

failure_history.suggested_action: Check runtime args indexing. Verify tensor addresses and buffer sizes. Look for off-by-one errors in tile counting.

stages.name: subtract_mean
stages.description: Add Pass 2: re-read input, tilize, subtract mean using COL broadcast. Produces centered data (x - mean) at full input shape.

stages.name: variance
stages.description: Add square and reduce_row to Pass 2 to compute variance. Output is reduced shape with only column 0 valid.

stages.name: normalize
stages.description: Add Pass 3: add epsilon+rsqrt to variance, re-read input, subtract mean, multiply by inv_std. Full layer normalization without affine parameters.

stages.name: affine
stages.description: Add gamma (scale) and beta (shift) affine transformation. Reader duplicates gamma/beta sticks for tilize. Compute tilizes gamma/beta once, then applies mul(gamma) and add(beta) in Pass 3.
stages.extra_setup:
gamma = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1])
beta = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1])
stages.extra_ttnn_setup:
gamma_ttnn = ttnn.from_torch(gamma, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device)
beta_ttnn = ttnn.from_torch(beta, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device)
